description: Vulnerability in the Oracle Supply Chain Trading Connector product of Oracle E-Business Suite (component: Collaboration History).  Supported versions that are affected are 12.2.3-12.2.15. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows low privileged attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Supply Chain Trading Connector.  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in  unauthorized access to critical data or complete access to all Oracle Supply Chain Trading Connector accessible data. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 6.5 (Confidentiality impacts).  CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N).
